stage_manifest.stage_name: Follow Up Sleep Test After Delivery

eligible_actions.label: Send patient a dynamic link to complete the basic quiz
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has not completed their initial assessment quiz. The system will generate a unique quiz link and QR code, then send it via email/SMS to the patient. This is the first step in the patient journey and must be completed before proceeding to consultation scheduling.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient to complete the initial quiz
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, please complete your initial assessment quiz to help us understand your sleep concerns better.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has been sent a quiz link but hasn't completed it yet. Send a friendly reminder to encourage completion. This is different from 'send_quiz_link' which creates and sends the initial quiz link.

eligible_actions.label: Mark quiz as completed (manual override)
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action to manually mark the quiz as completed when the patient has completed it but the system hasn't detected it automatically.

eligible_actions.label: Mark initial consultation as completed
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the initial consultation with the sleep expert has been completed. This marks the consultation as finished and allows the patient to proceed to the next stage in their treatment journey.

eligible_actions.label: Schedule sleep study with sleep doctor
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the sleep expert has determined that a sleep study is needed to diagnose the patient's sleep apnea. Schedule the sleep study with a sleep doctor to gather diagnostic data.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient about upcoming sleep study
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, reminder about your upcoming sleep study. Please arrive 15 minutes early and avoid caffeine after 2 PM.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has a scheduled sleep study and needs a reminder about preparation instructions and arrival time.

eligible_actions.label: Upload required sleep test files
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has completed their sleep study and needs to upload the test results. This will redirect to the patient details page where files can be uploaded.

eligible_actions.label: Schedule sleep test review with sleep doctor
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when sleep test files have been uploaded and the sleep doctor needs to review the results. Schedule a consultation to discuss the sleep study findings and determine the next steps.

eligible_actions.label: Mark sleep doctor followup as completed
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the sleep doctor has completed their followup consultation and reviewed the sleep study results. This marks the completion of the sleep medicine evaluation phase.

eligible_actions.label: Schedule consultation with dental sleep specialist
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the sleep study has been completed and the patient is ready for dental sleep medicine consultation. Schedule with a dental sleep specialist to discuss oral appliance treatment options.

eligible_actions.label: Request CBCT observation report from Vizbriz (includes patient ID)
eligible_actions.message_template: Please upload required report for patient ID {patient_id}.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient needs CBCT (Cone Beam Computed Tomography) observation reports. This will send an email to info@vizbridge.com requesting Vizbriz to upload the relevant CBCT report for the patient. The email automatically includes the patient ID.

eligible_actions.label: Upload required intraoral scan files
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient needs to provide intraoral scan files. This will redirect to the patient details page where files can be uploaded.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient to upload required documents
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, please upload your required documents to continue with your treatment plan.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient needs to upload required documents (intraoral scans or HIPAA consent forms) but hasn't completed the upload yet. Send a reminder to encourage document submission.

eligible_actions.label: Send email to patient requesting HIPAA consent forms with upload link
eligible_actions.message_template:
You have been requested by the clinic to complete the patient onboarding process. Please use the following link to complete the process before your next appointment.

Best regards,
Your Dental Sleep Team
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient needs to provide HIPAA consent forms. This will send an email to the patient with a link to upload the required documents. The email will include the patient's name and a direct link to the upload page.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient to upload required documents
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, please upload your required documents to continue with your treatment plan.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient needs to upload required documents (intraoral scans or HIPAA consent forms) but hasn't completed the upload yet. Send a reminder to encourage document submission.

eligible_actions.label: Mark dental sleep expert consultation as completed
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the dental sleep expert consultation has been completed. This marks the completion of the dental evaluation and allows the patient to proceed with oral appliance treatment.

eligible_actions.label: Request OSA report from Vizbriz (emails info@vizbriz.com)
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Send an admin reminder to info@vizbriz.com to upload the patient's OSA report. Stage completes only after the file is uploaded.

eligible_actions.label: Place order for oral appliance
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the OSA report is ready and all required documents (CBCT, intraoral scan, HIPAA consent) are uploaded. This orders the custom oral appliance for the patient. The appliance will be manufactured and delivered to the dental office.

eligible_actions.label: Update device delivery status
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the oral appliance has been delivered to the dental office. Update the delivery status to track the device arrival and prepare for patient fitting.

eligible_actions.label: Schedule oral appliance delivery appointment
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the oral appliance has been delivered and is ready for patient fitting. Schedule the delivery appointment to fit the custom oral appliance to the patient.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient about oral appliance delivery appointment
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, reminder about your oral appliance delivery appointment. Please bring your ID and insurance card.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has a scheduled oral appliance delivery appointment and needs a reminder about what to bring and arrival instructions.

eligible_actions.label: Mark appliance delivery as completed
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the oral appliance delivery appointment has been completed. The patient has received their custom oral appliance and instructions for use.

eligible_actions.label: Schedule Follow-Up Sleep Test
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action to schedule the follow-up sleep test to assess the effectiveness of the oral appliance treatment. This is the next required step after device delivery.

eligible_actions.label: Mark Follow-Up Sleep Test as Completed
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the follow-up sleep test has been completed and results are available. This marks the completion of the treatment effectiveness evaluation.

eligible_actions.label: Send reminder to patient to complete follow-up sleep test
eligible_actions.message_template: Hi {patient_name}, please complete your follow-up sleep test to assess the effectiveness of your oral appliance.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this action when the patient has received their oral appliance but hasn't completed the follow-up sleep test yet. Send a reminder to encourage them to schedule and complete the effectiveness evaluation.

eligible_actions.label: Share patient files
eligible_actions.message_template: Please find the shared files below.
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: Use this to share selected patient files. Links are short and time-limited.

eligible_actions.label: View patient files
eligible_actions.ai_guidance: View all patient files, grouped by category. Preview or select files to share.
